title: TOS context overlay
description: A composable, scoped rule-set that patches the resolved teaching-context contract. Overlays stack by precedence (state/compliance wins on conflict) and accumulate mandates/SOPs/notes. Stored offline under canonical-sources/overlays/context/<scope>/<id>.json and filled in over time. Canonical prose: shared/context/overlays.md.

match.description: Selector predicate; the overlay applies when every key here equals the resolve() selector. {} = always applies.

precedence.description: Higher wins on `overrides` conflicts; defaults to the scope rank.

sets.description: Default field values, applied only if the field is empty.

adds.description: List contributions appended (never lost): mandates, sop_refs, notes, exceptions, frameworks.
